project_context.description: A dashboard combining academic rigor with a modern, colorful aesthetic. Focuses on clear data visualization, genetic algorithm controls, and a vibrant, color-coded weekly schedule grid.

rules: Use 'font-worksans' for body text and data labels.
Metrics and numbers (fitness, generations) must use tabular-nums utility.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.

spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-6 for cards to provide breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-md for inner elements like inputs and calendar blocks.

components.cards: Flat white surfaces (bg-white), sharp 1px border (border-slate-200), no default shadow. Add soft shadow (shadow-md) only on hover for interactive cards.
components.buttons: Primary CTA 'Generar Horarios' must use bg-indigo-600 text-white font-semibold. Secondary buttons use outline variant.
components.calendar_grid: CSS Grid layout. Leftmost column for time slots (e.g., 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM). Top row for days (Lunes - Viernes). Schedule blocks use random colors from the 'calendar_blocks' palette based on the subject (Materia).
components.charts: Use Recharts AreaChart for 'Evolución del Fitness'. Fill with gradient using 'chart_fill' to transparent.
components.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn UI forms. Use 'Tabs' to switch between 'Carga por CSV' and 'Formulario Manual'. Use Shadcn 'Slider' for algorithm parameters (Población, Generaciones, Mutación).

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons for dashboard elements (e.g., ChartLineUp, CalendarBlank, SlidersHorizontal, UploadSimple, Users, BookOpen).

empty_schedule_state.description: Abstract 3D illustration of floating colorful calendar blocks. Use this in the main schedule area before the user clicks 'Generar Horarios'. Display with max-w-md and opacity-90.

testing_attributes.rule: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='generate-schedule-btn', data-testid='fitness-chart').

Dashboard.Header: Logo/Title 'Generador de Horarios Evolutivo' on left. Export button on right.
Sidebar_Left_Col_Span_3: Section 1: Data Entry. Tabs for 'Cargar Archivos' (CSV Dropzone) and 'Manual' (Buttons opening Dialogs to add Profesores, Grupos, Materias).
Section 3: Parámetros del Algoritmo. Sliders for Tamaño de Población (10-200), Generaciones (10-500), Probabilidad de Mutación (0.01-1.0).
Action: Huge 'Generar Horarios' Button at the bottom.
Main_Content_Col_Span_9: Top Bar: Dropdowns 'Filtrar por Grupo' and 'Filtrar por Profesor'.
Center: Weekly Calendar Grid. Shows the empty_schedule_state image initially. Once generated, displays the color-coded schedule.
Bottom Row (Split 2 cols): Left -> Convergence Chart (Fitness vs Generaciones). Right -> Métricas Panel (Reglas rotas: Choques de profesor, Choques de grupo, Horas sin asignar).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI exclusively in Spanish.
Preload sample data for 3 Profesores, 3 Grupos, and 5 Materias so the dashboard is functional immediately.
The calendar visualization must dynamically place blocks using grid-row-start based on time and grid-column-start based on the day. Add minimum gap-1 between calendar blocks.
For the 'Colorida' requirement, ensure every distinct 'Materia' gets a different pastel background color with its matching high-contrast text and border from the 'calendar_blocks' palette.
